profile.title: My referee profile
profile.phoneHint: The phone number is used by the RSK solely in urgent cases during assignment. It is not shared with third parties or used for any other purpose.
profile.assignmentInfoHint: This information comes from your profile and is used solely for referee assignment.
profile.shortNoticeMobile: I am available at short notice
profile.shortNoticeMobileHint: Enable this if you can step in for assignments at short notice (mobile).
profile.addressHint: Only used for distance calculation when assigning games.
profile.partnerHint: Enter the license number of your primary partner here to simplify our assignments.

card.title: My card
card.disclaimer: This card was issued by Floorball-Verband Deutschland e. V. Validity and license level can be checked via the QR code or at saisonmanager.de/lizenzcheck.

availabilities.title: My availability
availabilities.intro: Click a day to mark yourself as available or to remove the mark. For a range: click the first day, then click the last day. Assigners can only schedule you on days you have marked as available.
availabilities.pastAvailable: Past day – you had reported availability (read-only)

gameDays.title: My match days
gameDays.intro: If your state association has set up a match day checklist, confirm your match days here as properly conducted – or report them as not properly conducted and answer the checklist. Confirmation is possible from the start of the last game. Without confirmation within 48 hours, a match day is automatically considered confirmed.
gameDays.checklistHint: Please answer every question. If you answer "No", the responsible game operations committee will be notified.
gameDays.reportedImproperAt: Reported as not properly conducted on {{ date }}
